recommendations.title: Che: Part One
recommendations.overview: Ernesto Guevara, known as 'Che', leads a group of Cuban exiles under Fidel Castro in a revolution to overthrow Fulgencio Batista, the dictator of Cuba.

recommendations.title: Schizopolis
recommendations.overview: A man works for the unpleasant guru of a Scientology-like movement.

recommendations.title: Side Effects
recommendations.overview: A woman turns to prescription medication as a way of handling her anxiety concerning her husband's upcoming release from prison.

recommendations.title: Unsane
recommendations.overview: A woman is involuntarily committed to a mental institution where she is confronted by her greatest fear.

recommendations.title: Behind the Candelabra
recommendations.overview: Based on the autobiographical novel, the tempestuous 6-year relationship between Liberace and his (much younger) lover, Scott Thorson, is recounted.

recommendations.title: Full Frontal
recommendations.overview: A day in the life of a group of men and women in Hollywood, in the hours leading up to a friend's birthday party.

recommendations.title: No Sudden Move
recommendations.overview: A group of criminals are brought together under mysterious circumstances and have to work together to uncover what's really going on when their simple job goes completely sideways.

recommendations.title: Erin Brockovich
recommendations.overview: A twice-divorced mother of three who sees an injustice, takes on the bad guy and wins -- with a little help from her push-up bra. Erin goes to work for an attorney and comes across medical records describing illnesses clustered in one nearby town. Sh

recommendations.title: Bubble
recommendations.overview: Set against the backdrop of a decaying Midwestern town, a murder becomes the focal point of three people who work in a doll factory.

recommendations.title: Black Bag
recommendations.overview: When intelligence agent Kathryn Woodhouse is suspected of betraying the nation, her husband – also a legendary agent – faces the ultimate test of whether to be loyal to his marriage, or his country.
